svg.title: ShopWave Agent — System Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: Full architecture of ShopWave: Frontend React app, Backend Express API, Agent Engine pipeline, LLM subsystem, and PostgreSQL database.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the user interact with ShopWave Agent?')
sendPrompt('What does Dashboard.tsx do in ShopWave?')
sendPrompt('How does useTickets hook poll the backend?')
sendPrompt('What does AuditTimeline show in ShopWave?')
sendPrompt('What file types can UploadModal accept?')
sendPrompt('What API routes does ShopWave expose?')
sendPrompt('What does ticketController handle?')
sendPrompt('How does ticketService poll and batch tickets?')
sendPrompt('How does ShopWave import datasets?')
sendPrompt('How does LLM analysis work in the agent?')
sendPrompt('What entities does the agent extract from tickets?')
sendPrompt('What tools does the agent call to gather context?')
sendPrompt('How does the agent route tickets by category?')
sendPrompt('How does the policy engine decide refund eligibility?')
sendPrompt('How does the agent decide to issue a refund vs escalate?')
sendPrompt('What actions can the agent take: refund, reply, escalate?')
sendPrompt('How does the agent log every step to audit_logs?')
sendPrompt('How does GeminiProvider classify tickets?')
sendPrompt('How does OpenRouterProvider work?')
sendPrompt('How does the NLP fallback classify tickets without LLM?')
sendPrompt('What columns are in the tickets table?')
sendPrompt('How are customers, orders and products related in the DB?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in audit_logs for each ticket?')
sendPrompt('How does the knowledge base work in ShopWave?')
sendPrompt('What is the ticket_runs table used for?')

svg.text: Retry: up to 3 attempts per tool · exponential backoff · permanent fail → escalate
Confidence = LLM score − penalties (missing entities, retries, invalid outputs, ambiguous)
